summary: RBAC Phase 2 Backend Migration Testing - Complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed admin access to all RBAC-protected features including broadcast, dashboard messages, equipes-garde settings, and equipment categories.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ dashboard_messages.py - require_permission correctly implemented for 'dashboard' module with 'modifier' and 'supprimer' actions
✅ broadcast.py - require_permission correctly implemented for 'parametres modifier' permission
✅ equipes_garde.py - require_permission correctly implemented for 'parametres modifier' with 'rotation-equipes' tab
✅ equipements_exports.py - require_permission correctly implemented for 'actifs creer' with 'categories' and 'materiel' tabs
✅ notifications.py - require_permission correctly implemented for 'parametres modifier' permission
✅ generation_indisponibilites.py - user_has_module_action correctly used for 'disponibilites modifier' permission
✅ All GET endpoints remain accessible to authenticated users (no permission required for read)
✅ All POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints correctly require specific RBAC permissions
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_RBAC_Message and TEST_DELETE_Message during dashboard message tests (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC Phase 2 backend migration verified. All routes migrated to require_permission are working correctly. The following files were tested: dashboard_messages.py, broadcast.py, equipes_garde.py, equipements_exports.py, notifications.py, generation_indisponibilites.py. Admin user has full access (is_full_access: true). Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_rbac_phase2_migration.py can be reused for regression testing.

require_permission_function.usage: await require_permission(tenant.id, current_user, module_id, action, tab_id)
require_permission_function.behavior: Raises HTTPException 403 if user lacks permission

rbac_verification.admin_behavior: Admin role has is_full_access: true, granting access to all features
